summary: End-to-end testing of AVLE-C (FastAPI + React + MongoDB + eth-tester). 13/13 backend pytest cases pass; all 6 frontend pages load with zero JS errors; full analyze pipeline produces NDVI images, XGBoost projection chart, MLP recommendation and blockchain receipt.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') hooks; should migrate to lifespan context manager (non-blocking, future-compat).
AnalyzeResponse Pydantic model is declared but /api/analyze returns a raw dict - the model is effectively unused; either wire it in with response_model or remove.
CORS allow_origins='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is a browser-ignored combination; either tighten origins or set allow_credentials=False.
/api/analyze catches all exceptions and maps them to HTTP 503; genuine client errors (bad bbox, invalid date strings) will be masked. Consider splitting ValueError -> 400 vs runtime -> 503.
/api/jobs list endpoint has no pagination offset or total count - OK for MVP but worth noting.
test_credentials: none required (no auth in this app)
seed_data_creation: none; pre-trained weights and ablation JSON shipped with repo. Analyze call inserted one MongoDB doc into db.analyses during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL = https://emission-estimator.preview.emergentagent.com. Use use_synthetic=true in analyze payloads for sub-second responses; real planetary-computer path works too (~6s observed). Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/pytest/test_avle_backend.py covers health, analyze fields, ablation, weights, blockchain status+verify, datasets listing and download for all 4 CSVs, unknown-dataset 404, and jobs list. All testids verified: run-analysis-btn, results-panel, img-ndvi-t1, img-ndvi-t2, img-loss, rec-action, chain-tx, ablation-table (6 rows), ledger-table, download-carbon/recommendation/xgb_bau/xgb_sequences. No JS errors on /, /analyze, /ablation, /ledger, /datasets, /about.
